text.title: E2E-to-Contract Migration Recipe Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a E2E-to-Contract Migration Recipe artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A solo dev has 12 e2e tests; 4 cover the `/api/orders` POST + GET. Suite takes 8 min, flakes 3x/week. Extracting an OpenAPI file + Schemathesis tests cuts those 4 tests to <2s combined, drops flake rate to 0; spec records the gain and notes that `/checkout-flow` e2e stays as it covers multi-page state.

list.item: Step 1 — prerequisites_ok=true; all input refs reachable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
Step 4 — validator script exits 0; no violations.

section.title: Outcome
section.p: The artefact is auditable by a downstream reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning. Every non-trivial field traces back to an evidence row; rejected fields surface as structured skip-with-reason instead of polluting the library with degraded output.
